header.title: Registration Form Builder
header.description: Add, remove, and reorder fields in the user registration form. Changes are saved automatically.

confirmRemove: Remove this field from the registration form?

import.confirmBody: This uploads a new field list and publishes it to learners immediately, replacing every field currently in this form. This can't be undone from here — note down your current fields first if you want to keep them.
import.confirmBodyDirty: You also have unsaved changes in the editor — importing will discard them.
import.success: Imported — version {{version}} is live for learners
import.genericError: Could not import the CSV. Please check the file and try again.
